$comment: scripts/OaksLab.asm — Oak himself: parcel delivery first (-> the Pokédex beat), else OaksLabOak1Text's exact branch order — the dex rating once the collection is going (PALLET_AFTER_GETTING_POKEBALLS, or >=2 owned with the dex), then, only with NO POKé BALLs in the bag, the one-time 5-ball gift after the Route 22 rival (.give_poke_balls, fully authored — wave C; the gift lands before the flag so a refused give_item leaves the one-time gift claimable, one improvement over the retired beat), else the story-progress lines.

then.text:
OAK: Oh, {player}! How is my old
POKéMON? Well, it seems to
like you a lot. You must be
talented as a
POKéMON trainer! What? You have
something for me?

Ah! This is the
custom POKé BALL
I ordered!
Thank you!

{rival}: What did
you call me for?

OAK: Oh right! I
have a request
of you two.

On the desk there
is my invention,
POKéDEX! It automatically
records data on
POKéMON you've
seen or caught! It's a hi-tech
encyclopedia!

OAK: {player} and
{rival}! Take
these with you! {player} got
POKéDEX from OAK!

To make a complete
guide on all the
POKéMON in the
world... That was my dream! But, I'm too old!
I can't do it! So, I want you two
to fulfill my
dream for me! Get moving, you
two! This is a great
undertaking in
POKéMON history!

{rival}: Alright
Gramps! Leave it
all to me! {player}, I hate to
say it, but I
don't need you! I know! I'll
borrow a TOWN MAP
from my sis! I'll tell her not
to lend you one,
{player}! Hahaha!

OAK: Come see me
sometimes. I want to know how
your POKéDEX is
coming along.

OAK: Come see me
sometimes. I want to know how
your POKéDEX is
coming along.

else.text:
OAK: You can't get
detailed data on
POKéMON by just
seeing them. You must catch
them! Use these
to capture wild
POKéMON.

When a wild
POKéMON appears,
it's fair game. Just throw a POKé
BALL at it and try
to catch it! This won't always
work, though. A healthy POKéMON
could escape. You
have to be lucky!

then.text:
POKéMON around the
world wait for
you, {player}!

OAK: {player},
raise your young
POKéMON by making
it fight!

OAK: If a wild
POKéMON appears,
your POKéMON can
fight against it!

else.text:
OAK: Now, {player},
which POKéMON do
you want?
